scripts.serve: npm run build && node ../../scripts/firebase/check-emulator-java.mjs && firebase emulators:start --only auth,functions,firestore,storage --project dev
scripts.serve:functions: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --project dev
scripts.test:workflow-config: npm run build && node --test test/figurineWorkflowConfig.test.mjs test/aiProviderReferenceImages.test.mjs test/meshyFigurineProvider.test.mjs
scripts.test:pipeline: npm run build && node --test test/pipeline.test.mjs test/operatorConsole.test.mjs
